positive: A cyberpunk street scene at night. Rain streaks down neon-lit skyscrapers, reflecting holographic advertisements and flying vehicles. Focus on deep shadows, intense cyan and magenta neon glow, and industrial grit. Style: Neo-Tokyo aesthetic, cinematic oil painting, ultra-detailed.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, cheerful, pastoral, cartoon
